name: Task Journal Checkbox Sink

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Removed prohibited global ESLint directive comments flagged by the Obsidian automated review.
- Updated mixed Chinese/English UI copy to comply with Obsidian's sentence-case rule without suppressions.

No task behavior, settings, or stored data changed in this patch.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Task Journal Checkbox Sink 1.1.0

First public release.

- Record completed and partial task outcomes in Daily Notes.
- Sink completed tasks within their current sibling list.
- Archive task blocks by their actual completion date.
- Undo the latest status, checkbox, or archive operation.
- Optimized for desktop, Android, and iOS.

中文说明请查看 README。
releases.name: Task Journal Checkbox Sink 1.1.0
